fn_def_list.fn_code: void _TIFFfree(void *p) { free(p); }
void *_TIFFrealloc(void *p, tmsize_t s) { return (realloc(p, (size_t)s)); }
void _TIFFmemset(void *p, int v, tmsize_t c) { memset(p, v, (size_t)c); }
